selectedOwner: docs/operations/authority-model.md emergency containment contract plus the exact app incident runbook
decision: Reject deployment, promotion, release, message, login, profile/data deletion, provider switching, approval resume, and normal operations; permit at most one separately approved exact-target deny, disable, isolate, or revoke containment action.
evidenceRequired: Named principal, separate approver, exact target and containment operation, maximum 30-minute expiry, and before/after sanitized receipts.
Mandatory reconciliation within 24 hours before normal authority may resume.
limitations: Unavailable target readback remains inconclusive before and after containment.
nonClaims: Emergency containment does not prove health, recovery, incident resolution, delivery, or Production state.
rollbackRevocation: End the one-shot authority at 30 minutes or use; preserve receipts, reconcile the exact target within 24 hours, and obtain ordinary authority separately for any recovery operation.
